channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq pare losses on hopes that Iran could reopen the Strait of Hormuz  uk.finance.yahoo.com
  3. Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq pare losses as investors monitor Strait of Hormuz; U.S. oil climbs after Trump address on Iran conflict; gold falls  MarketWatch
  4. Stocks Advance on Hopes for Quick End to War  WSJ
  5. Wall Street Traders Say Positioning Not Peace Is Driving Stocks  Bloomberg.com

item.title: SUBARU UNVEILS ALL-NEW, ALL-ELECTRIC, THREE-ROW 2027 SUBARU GETAWAY WITH 420 HORSEPOWER, MORE THAN 300 MILES OF RANGE, STANDARD ALL-WHEEL DRIVE - Subaru U.S. Media Center
item.description:
1. SUBARU UNVEILS ALL-NEW, ALL-ELECTRIC, THREE-ROW 2027 SUBARU GETAWAY WITH 420 HORSEPOWER, MORE THAN 300 MILES OF RANGE, STANDARD ALL-WHEEL DRIVE  Subaru U.S. Media Center

  3. New Getaway Means Subaru Has an Electric SUV in Every Size  Gizmodo
  4. View Interior Photos of the 2027 Subaru Getaway  Car and Driver
  5. Subaru’s New Three-Row Looks Even Better Compared to Its Toyota Twin  Gear Patrol

item.title: Jaden Ivey’s turbulent NBA career: From top-five pick to waived by the Bulls - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Jaden Ivey’s turbulent NBA career: From top-five pick to waived by the Bulls  The New York Times
  2. Bulls waive guard Jaden Ivey after anti-gay comments  ESPN

  5. Jaden Ivey’s wife breaks silence after ‘one lie’ sparks drama during NBA star’s sad spiral  New York Post

item.title: Trump risks falling in to the ‘asymmetric resolve’ trap in Iran − just as presidents before him did elsewhere - The Conversation
item.description:
1. Trump risks falling in to the ‘asymmetric resolve’ trap in Iran − just as presidents before him did elsewhere  The Conversation
  2. Trump Initially Laid Out Five Goals for the Iran War. Here’s Where They Stand.  The New York Times
  3. Tired Trump’s speech proves he has no route out of Iran war  The Telegraph
  4. Opinion | America Faces Tough Choices in Iran  WSJ
  5. Trump's blurry vision of victory in Iran  Axios
